name: exp26_moving_br_mask_v1
known_limitations: Masks are smooth synthetic ellipses/circles rather than semantic object masks.
At least one Probe4 sample touches the frame boundary for several frames.
Use as moving BR stress masks, not as proof of natural semantic occluder quality.
gate16_requirement: Proceed only after official 49-frame VideoPainter inference smoke succeeds and visual review confirms no systematic artifacts.
